channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI interviews now ask for this
item.description: In our production systems at [redacted fintech], we saw a 37% increase in flaky tests after migrating to pytest 8.1 in Q3 2024.

item.title: AI codebase: keep it or kill it (40% dilemma)
item.description: Cut incident rates 62% by rewriting 20% of AI code — the hard numbers on guardrails vs human rewrite for 40% AI codebases in 2026

item.title: Schema-per-tenant: the 2026 trade-offs nobody talks
item.description: Cut multi-tenant SaaS costs 43% by switching from PostgreSQL RLS to schema-per-tenant in 2026 — real latency, cost, and onboarding numbers from a live system using Python 3.11 and PostgreSQL 16.

item.title: Python 3.13 free-threaded: 30% faster APIs
item.description: Load balancers were distributing traffic evenly, but every so often—around 03:17 AM our time—latency would spike to 800ms from the usual 45ms.

item.title: 5 post-flag platforms for A/B testing in 2026
item.description: Cut experiment setup time 70% with 5 post-flag platforms in 2026 — real benchmarks, 4G-friendly SDKs, and hidden costs nobody tells you about.

item.title: AI interviews: the new tests replacing LeetCode
item.description: Cut interview rejection rates 54% with a single-file Python test instead of Docker setups — the AI-era format replacing LeetCode in 2026

item.title: 5 things HTMX replaced in my stack
item.description: Cut frontend build time 95% and TTFB 71% with HTMX — the real latency numbers, Docker image sizes, and the one mistake I made when migrating off React

item.title: Merge three payment APIs into one system
item.description: Cut payment integrations from three APIs to one gateway in Kenya, Nigeria, and Ghana. See 3x latency drops, 22% cost savings, and a single observability dashboard — with real numbers and code.

item.title: Fine-tune or prompt: who wins in 2026?
item.description: Cut LLM costs 80% with fine-tuning in 2026 — real latency, hallucination, and support ticket data from a live system. Compare 70B fine-tuned vs 405B prompt-only on AWS SageMaker.

item.title: AI scans code: what it finds — and what it misses
item.description: AI scanners now catch 40-60% of escaped vulnerabilities in 2026 — but they miss logic flaws and hallucinate issues. Learn which tools to pair with them, how to tune confidence, and why manual review still matters.

item.title: OpenTelemetry stuck — here’s how to use it
item.description: Cut observability ingestion 70% with OpenTelemetry in 2026 — Collector v0.94 sampling, OTLP wire format, and the head vs tail sampler mistake most teams make.

item.title: Observability 2026: ditch the three pillars
item.description: Replace Prometheus + Grafana + Jaeger with one ClickHouse table in 2026. Save $4k/month, cut query latency 47×, and keep every span forever. Learn the new unified telemetry model and the exact schema.

item.title: Cut AWS bills 32%: AWS Cost Explorer vs. Infracost
item.description: Cut AWS bills 32%: AWS Cost Explorer vs Infracost — the real FinOps levers for mid-size teams in 2026. Compare speed, accuracy, and ROI with concrete numbers and benchmarks.

item.title: PWAs in 2026: what browsers finally fixed
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with PWA caching — Background Sync v2, File System Access API, and the install prompt mistake most solo founders miss.

item.title: Container builds in 2026: 7 speed hacks you missed
item.description: Cut CI pipeline time 80% with BuildKit, depot.dev, and registry cache — concrete benchmarks, costs, and migration steps for Node 20 LTS services in 2026.

item.title: Soft deletes fail: what breaks first
item.description: Cut API response time 75% by ditching soft deletes — index bloat, 1.8s queries, and $18k/month storage bills exposed

item.title: Block 80% of traffic with Workers
item.description: Cut origin load 79% with Cloudflare Workers caching — Durable Objects for rate limiting, KV for storage, and real results from a 6-week run in 2026.

item.title: AI burnout: why output pressure rose even as tools got
item.description: Cut burnout 30% by measuring AI’s net time saved — GitHub Copilot Enterprise, Cursor logs, and the PR size trap most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: AI API docs: what humans still write in 2026
item.description: Cut API error rates 63% with guardrail docs — learn what humans must still write, Speakeasy 2.8, FastAPI 0.111, and the guardrail doc template that blocks AI hallucinations.

item.title: TLS stack breaks under post-quantum crypto
item.description: Cut TLS latency 22% when enabling Kyber768 — the hidden costs, AWS ALB tuning, and the hybrid cert generation workflow most teams miss in 2026.
